---
title: "US Inflation"
author: "Marco Sorbona, PhD"
date: "March 2026"
echo: false
format: 
  html: 
    toc: true
    theme: cosmo
    code-fold: false
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
#| warning: false
#| message: true
library(tidyverse)
library(tidymodels)
library(scales)
library(ggthemes)
```
